description: Sign and verify a LocalAuth challenge transcript. The transcript layout is fixed; Ed25519 signing is deterministic (RFC 8032), so given the same auth signing seed the signature bytes are byte-exact across clients.

negativeCases.name: wrong-public-key
mutations: flip first byte of inputs.authPublicKeyHex before verifying

negativeCases.name: tampered-challenge
mutations: flip first byte of inputs.challengeHex before verifying

serverBoundOutputs.name: signature
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Auth challenge signature is sent to the server for verification.

serverBoundOutputs.name: authPublicKey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Auth verifying key is registered with the server.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: authSigningSeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Auth signing seed is derived client-side and must never reach the server.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: password
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: The user password must never be transmitted in any form.
